tuning: E A D G B E
content:
DON'T LIE - Black Eyed Peas
Tabbed by: Shaun
Email: guitar_rocks78@hotmail.com
Capo 2nd fret

[tab][Intro]
(Guitar Part I):
e|---7--5--7--5--3-3--|
B|---8--7--8--7--5-5--|
G|--------------------|
D|--------------------|
A|--------------------|
E|--------------------|[/tab]

[Intro]
(Guitar Part II)
G, C [x2]

[tab][Verse 1] 
(Guitar Part I)
e|---7--5--7--5--3-3--|
B|---8--7--8--7--5-5--|
G|--------------------|
D|--------------------|
A|--------------------|
E|--------------------|[/tab]

[Verse 1]
(Guitar Part II)

[Lyrics]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Hey, baby my nose is getting big[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
I noticed it be growing when I been telling them fibs[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
Now you say your trust's getting weaker[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Probably coz my lies just started getting deeper[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
And the reason for my confession is that I learn my lesson[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]                                 [ch]C[/ch]
And I really think you ought to know the truth[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
Because I lied and I cheated and I lied a little more[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]
But after I did it I don't know what I did it for[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I admit that I have been a little immature[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                             [ch]C[/ch]
F***ing with your heart like I was the predator[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
In my book of lies I was the editor[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
And the author[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]
I forged my signature[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
And now I apologise for what I did to you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]
Cos what you did to me I did to you[/tab]

[Chorus](Guitar I has no part):
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                        [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
No, no, no, no baby, no, no, no, no don't lie[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                                          [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
No, no, no, no, yeah, you know, know, know, know, you gotta try[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
What you gonna do when it all comes out[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
When I really see you & what you're all about[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                    [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
No, no, no baby, no, no, no, no don't lie[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                                                [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch] 
Yeah, you know, you know, you know, you know, you know, you gotta try[/tab]
